title: Diagnose — Audit Luna X account and freeze growth charter

context.description:
## Objective
Determine the root cause of the task failure.

## Context
Leaf task linked without observable progress; open repair trail and keep source task gated until validated.

## Required Output
- Root cause
- Proposed repair owner
- Explicit next repair step
context.acceptance_criteria: Root cause identified and repair path proposed.
context.qa_checks: Provide explicit evidence and next-step recommendation.
